situational_context: Running comeback week 5: 7 runs completed since May 3, now consistently reaching 5+ km (Run #7: 5.23 km on Jun 3). VO2max running improved to 39.9 (from 38.3 at start). Currently in post-Run #7 recovery dip — HRV UNBALANCED for 2 consecutive days (28, 31), training readiness 32, body battery 33. Expected to resolve within 48h. Primary modality remains e-bike commuting (~38 km/day round trip on sur site days). Chronic load declining (15.5, down from 22.3 on May 14) as older cycling sessions roll off the 28-day window faster than running builds new load. ACWR 1.13 — safe zone. Weight steadily declining: 102.97 kg (from 104.1 kg on May 8). No new labs since Dec 2025. Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026. Young baby (Léonie, 5 months) — sleep occasionally fragmented.

recommendations.text: Gate Saturday's gravel session on HRV recovery. If HRV ≥34 Saturday morning, execute 50 min Z2. If HRV <32, downgrade to 30 min Z1 easy ride or ebike balade.
recommendations.measurable: HRV ≥34 on Saturday morning Garmin reading

recommendations.text: Execute Run #8 on Sunday (5 km Z1-Z2, FC ≤137 bpm) only if zero post-Run #7 pain at 96h+ and Saturday's session didn't further suppress readiness. Two clean 5 km runs validate the palier and open progression to 5.5-6 km.
recommendations.measurable: Run #8 completed: 5 km, FC avg ≤137, no pain lasting >24h

recommendations.text: Increase daily protein intake toward 160g+ (1.6 g/kg). Last 7-day average was 134g, ~20% below target for tissue repair during running comeback at 103 kg.
recommendations.measurable: Average daily protein ≥155g over the next 7 days

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 30 or UNBALANCED persists ≥3 consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Post-Run #7 dip (28, 31) — monitoring for recovery vs sustained suppression

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if RHR stays ≥52 for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: RHR rose from 48-49 baseline to 52 over last 2 days

markers_to_watch.threshold: Target stabilization above 15, then gradual increase toward 20+
markers_to_watch.reason: Chronic load dropped 30% (22.3 → 15.5) as old sessions roll off
